UserComments.Comment: The charging station worx properly,but E.On company repeatedly performed deceptive behavior with goal to cheat U with pricing.For example their 8hrs.limit counts also for night,even they tell/write U the opposite,it is a trap,also they often charge U day-price(9.5CZK/KWh) also @ night(when they announce 8CZK/KWh),they r always lieing with pricing,be aware & do not forget interrupt charging every 8hrs.to avoid extra fees & do so also during night,they announced,that parking fee free minutes r not being deducted during night,but they R & by believing them 1ce,i was charged extra 745CZK.E.On is a highly deceptive company.

After i failed to charge @ north of the 2 charging stations,i connected to the south/right(seen on arrival) charging station & i charged here my vehicle succesfully.Use the south/right(seen on arrival) of the 2 charging stations,the right/south charging station is OK.

After i faild to activate the north charging station,i connected to south(right seen on arrival) charging station & charged my vehicle succesfully here.Use the south/right of the 2 charging stations,the right 1/south is OK.

The north(left seen on arrival) of 2 charging station is buggy,it has damaged touchscreen & RFID sensor,which causes troubles with authentication,i was unable to authenticate on AC,another user succeeded authentication on CCS,but charging details was not visible.

UsageCost: 8.5CZK/KWh for AC for E.On registered users,10CZK/KWh for AC for non-registered users.

AddressInfo.Title: E.On Public Charging Station(AC+DC) Penny Market.
AddressInfo.AccessComments: @ public parking lot of Penny Market,always open,no parking fees. NO WC nearby.

GeneralComments: 3 parking bays reserved for EVs/PHEVs surrounded by non-reserved parking bays,2 charging stations,3 identical outlets each,the left 1 is buggy,the right 1 works properly(seen on arrival).
